Edit Practice Area

Select a practice area from the list to modify its content details.

Available Practice Areas

👥 Matrimonial & Family Law

Short Description: Representation in divorce, custody, and family matters.

🏢 Commercial Matters & Commercial Courts

Short Description: Litigation and resolution of high-value commercial disputes under the Commercial Courts Act.

📊 Domestic Violence Protection

Short Description: Support and representation under the Domestic Violence Act, 2005.

📖 Marriage and Dowry Offences

Short Description: Legal assistance for dowry disputes and marriage-related cases.

💳 Cheque Dishonour (Section 138)

Short Description: Legal representation in dishonoured cheque and financial recovery cases.

📈 Civil Litigation

Short Description: Support in civil disputes, property claims, contracts, and resolutions.

⚖️ Criminal Litigation

Short Description: Representation in criminal trials, appeals, revisions, and bail matters.

📓 Arbitration & ADR

Short Description: Alternative dispute resolution through arbitration and conciliation.

📋 Consumer Protection

Short Description: Advocacy in consumer rights, product liability, and protection cases.

📍 Labour and Service Laws

Short Description: Compliance, employment contracts, and representation in labour disputes.
